executives.name: John Humphrey
executives.background: John Humphrey was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 15 May 2017 and as Chairman on 30 November 2023. He is a former Executive Dean of the Faculty of Law at Queensland University of Technology and a former Senior Partner of King & Wood Mallesons.

executives.name: Simon McKeon
executives.background: Simon is a Non-executive Director and Senior Independent Director. He has extensive experience in the financial services sector and was previously Executive Chairman of Macquarie Group's Victorian office.
